Tree Component Showcase

Basic Tree

A basic tree with default settings and single selection mode.

Multiple Selection

Tree with multiple selection mode enabled.

With Checkboxes

Tree with checkboxes for each node.

With Icons

Tree with icons for each node.

Searchable Tree

Tree with search functionality.

Drag and Drop

Tree with drag and drop functionality.

Editable Tree

Tree with editing capabilities. Double-click to edit.

Large Dataset

Tree with virtual scrolling for large datasets.
